retirement_reason: unstable AP verification / contracting-admin email structure — not promotion-ready, not valid for v0.2 gating

_internal.seam: DFARS alternate source authorization — supplier not on QPL for target NSN; CO authorization covers specific NSN/CLIN/contract and references engineering qualification data descriptively without document ID; EQ report proves technical adequacy independently; MRR receipt date falls within CO authorization window; two-condition framework in Section C.4.7 must be satisfied from independent documents
_internal.expected_reason: Payment for a DFARS-regulated component from an alternate source not listed on the QPL, cleared by documentation satisfying the two-condition framework in contract Section C.4.7. Four independent facts required: (1) DAMS-26-C-0019-SECT-C-4.7: contract section defines two conditions required to authorize alternate-source delivery — written Contracting Officer authorization for the specific alternate source, NSN, and CLIN; and engineering qualification test data demonstrating conformance to applicable performance and quality requirements. Section adds a documentation_review_note stating payments lacking either condition should be held, without naming the required documents. (2) CO-AUTH-2026-011: Contracting Officer authorization signed by P. Nakamura on January 15, 2026, authorizing Brennan Components Inc. (CAGE BRNC) as an alternate source for NSN 5962-01-394-4821 under CLIN 0003 of DAMS-26-C-0019, effective January 20 to December 31, 2026. References engineering qualification data on file demonstrating MIL-PRF-55310G conformance but does not name EQ-RPT-2025-0091 by document ID — evaluator must independently locate the report. (3) EQ-RPT-2025-0091: engineering qualification report, September 2025, showing Brennan Components Inc. component meets all 12 performance categories under MIL-PRF-55310G for NSN 5962-01-394-4821. Must be cross-referenced against CO-AUTH-2026-011 (which references EQ data descriptively) and SECT-C-4.7 (which requires EQ data as the second condition). (4) MRR-2026-0205: QAR receipt of 120 units of NSN 5962-01-394-4821 from Brennan Components Inc. on February 5, 2026. Receipt date falls within CO-AUTH-2026-011 effective window (January 20 to December 31, 2026), binding physical delivery to the authorized period. No single fact is sufficient.
_internal.suspicious_surface: Brennan Components Inc. (CAGE BRNC) is NOT_LISTED on the Qualified Products List (QPL) for NSN 5962-01-394-4821. QPL-listed source is Halcyon Semiconductor Inc. (CAGE HLCN). Procurement mismatch notice PMN-2026-0031 was issued identifying the alternate-source documentation path under Section C.4.7. Contracting Administration email references the QPL mismatch and PMN-2026-0031. MRR notes QPL screen flag. Brennan has no prior invoices on this contract. No document explicitly states that payment is approved or that all Section C.4.7 conditions are satisfied.
clearing_evidence: DAMS-26-C-0019-SECT-C-4.7: two-condition framework — written CO authorization for the specific alternate source/NSN/CLIN + engineering qualification test data demonstrating conformance. documentation_review_note states payments lacking CO authorization or qualification data should be held; does not name the required documents.

CO-AUTH-2026-011 (signed P. Nakamura, Jan 15, 2026): authorizes Brennan Components Inc. / CAGE BRNC as alternate source for NSN 5962-01-394-4821 under CLIN 0003 of DAMS-26-C-0019, effective Jan 20 to Dec 31, 2026. References 'engineering qualification data on file demonstrating MIL-PRF-55310G conformance' descriptively — does not name EQ-RPT-2025-0091 by document ID.

EQ-RPT-2025-0091 (Sept 2025, MIL-PRF-55310G): 12 categories PASS for Brennan Components Inc. component for NSN 5962-01-394-4821. Satisfies SECT-C-4.7 second condition. MRR-2026-0205: QAR receipt Feb 5, 2026 (within CO-AUTH-2026-011 effective window Jan 20 to Dec 31, 2026). All four facts required; no single document approves payment.
_internal.revision_notes: v1 initial draft. DFARS alternate source DEV sibling for HAB-009. Supplier: Brennan Components Inc. (CAGE BRNC). NSN: 5962-01-394-4821. CLIN 0003. Contract: DAMS-26-C-0019. 120 units x $385 = $46,200. CO-AUTH-2026-011 (Jan 20 to Dec 31, 2026). EQ-RPT-2025-0091 (September 2025, MIL-PRF-55310G, 12 categories). MRR received Feb 5, 2026. Section C.4.7 (not C.4.3). Contracting Officer: P. Nakamura (not D. Kowalski). QPL-listed: Halcyon Semiconductor Inc. CAGE HLCN (not Meridian Electronics Corp.). Procurement mismatch notice PMN-2026-0031 (not QN-2026-0047).

action.description: Brennan Components Inc. — NSN 5962-01-394-4821, 120 units, CLIN 0003, DAMS-26-C-0019

email_thread.subject: DAMS-26-C-0019 — Brennan Components Invoice BCI-2026-0197, CLIN 0003
email_thread.body: AP — invoice BCI-2026-0197 has been received for CLIN 0003 / NSN 5962-01-394-4821 under DAMS-26-C-0019. Brennan Components is not listed on the standard QPL for this NSN. PMN-2026-0031 identifies the alternate-source documentation path under Section C.4.7.

procurement_documents.subject: QPL Mismatch Review — NSN 5962-01-394-4821, Brennan Components Inc.
procurement_documents.review_basis: Supplier CAGE BRNC not listed on standard QPL screen for NSN 5962-01-394-4821; Section C.4.7 alternate-source documentation review required.

procurement_documents.notes: 120 units NSN 5962-01-394-4821 received and accepted. Supplier BRNC is not listed on the standard QPL screen for this NSN; alternate-source documentation should be verified against Section C.4.7 before payment processing.

procurement_documents.authorization_text: This authorization approves Brennan Components Inc. (CAGE BRNC) as an alternate source for the procurement of NSN 5962-01-394-4821 under Contract DAMS-26-C-0019, CLIN 0003, for the period January 20 through December 31, 2026. This authorization is based on engineering qualification data on file demonstrating that Brennan Components Inc.'s component conforms to the applicable performance and quality requirements for this NSN under MIL-PRF-55310G. This authorization does not modify any other contract terms.

procurement_documents.qualification_statement: Brennan Components Inc. component for NSN 5962-01-394-4821 meets all performance and quality requirements specified under MIL-PRF-55310G. Component is qualified for use in applications covered by this NSN.

procurement_documents.title: Section C.4.7 — Alternate Source Authorization
procurement_documents.relevant_clause: Deliveries under this contract must be sourced from suppliers listed on the applicable Qualified Products List (QPL) for the relevant NSN. An alternate source not listed on the QPL may be authorized for delivery under a specific CLIN if the Contracting Officer has issued written authorization for that alternate source, NSN, and CLIN, and if engineering qualification test data demonstrating the alternate source's conformance to applicable performance and quality requirements is on file with the Contracting Officer. Both conditions must be satisfied prior to delivery and payment processing.
procurement_documents.documentation_review_note: Payments for alternate-source deliveries lacking either the required Contracting Officer authorization or the engineering qualification test data should be held pending documentation review.
